title: ethdebug format overview (2025) - gnidan
description:
gnidan from ethdebug | Argot Collective introduced ethdebug - a debugging data format for Ethereum at Solidity Summit 2023. Since then, work has advanced on ethdebug's specification as well as its implementation by multiple debuggers and solc itself.

This year, gnidan was back on stage to share how this format is being designed, what the current status is, and what you can expect next.
